title: Counseling Session 心理咨询
scene: Tom和学校心理咨询师谈话。

lines.en: Hello, Tom. How have you been feeling lately?
lines.zh: 你好，汤姆。你最近感觉怎么样？

lines.en: I have been feeling a little sad and worried.
lines.zh: 我感觉有点难过和担心。

lines.en: Can you tell me what is making you feel that way?
lines.zh: 能告诉我是什么让你有这样的感觉吗？

lines.en: I am worried about my exams. I am afraid I will do badly.
lines.zh: 我担心考试。我害怕考不好。

lines.en: It is normal to feel worried. Everyone feels that way sometimes.
lines.zh: 担心是正常的。每个人有时候都会有这种感觉。

lines.en: What can I do to feel better?
lines.zh: 我怎样才能感觉好一些？

lines.en: Try to study a little every day. Do not wait until the last day.
lines.zh: 尝试每天学一点。不要等到最后一天。

lines.en: I also have trouble sleeping at night.
Try reading a book before bed. It helps you relax.
lines.zh: 睡前试试看书。那能帮你放松。

lines.en: Thank you. I feel better after talking to you.
lines.zh: 谢谢你。跟你聊完我感觉好多了。
